name: DAP
description: Direct encrypted P2P communication between OpenClaw instances

agent_name.description: Human-readable name for this agent instance, shared with peers during discovery (e.g. "Alice's coder")

peer_port.description: Local port for the P2P peer server (HTTP)

quic_port.description: Local port for the QUIC/UDP transport (optional fast transport)

data_dir.description: Directory to store identity and peer data (default: ~/.openclaw/dap)

tofu_ttl_days.description: Days before a TOFU public-key binding expires and is re-verified on next contact (default 7)
